page_metadata.biotools__summary: Genomicus-tunicates is a genome browser that enables users to navigate in tunicates genomes in several dimensions: linearly along chromosome axes, transversaly across different species, and chronologicaly along evolutionary time. It uses ANISEED (https://www.aniseed.cnrs.fr) database.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Genomicus-tunicates is a genome browser that enables users to navigate in tunicates genomes in several dimensions: linearly along chromosome axes, transversaly across different species, and chronologicaly along evolutionary time.
